# Blessing of the Forge

## Description

Upgrade all cards in your Hand for the rest of combat.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong when a hand contains multiple high-impact unupgraded cards, but less reliable than sustained draw or power generation when the deck needs consistency across an elite or boss fight.
